channel.title: ViralDeals - Fashion Edit
channel.description: Curated trending fashion edit from Amazon India.

item.title: Beat the Heat in Style, ₹492! 💼
item.description:
Stay cool and look great this summer with Peter England's Insignia Half Sleeve Polo T-Shirt. Made from cotton rich fabric with a premium pique weave, this polo shirt is perfect for outdoor activities like gardening or a casual day out with friends. The regular fit ensures a comfortable wear, and the half sleeve design keeps you breezy on hot summer days. Whether you're looking to upgrade your summer wear for men or just want a...
#SummerFashionTrends #GardeningToolsOnline #MenFashionClothing
